raw.objective: “This information can provide evidence-based guidelines for management of drug therapy when carbamazepine is discontinued.”
raw.observations: Determination of de-induction of SL-carbamazepine clearance. Few subjects but relatively rich data. Decent fit, but probably not enough predictors for accurate individualised discontinuation.
raw.dose: infusion doses before and after discontinuation of regular treatment in patients
raw.equations: CL =theta1*exp(eta1) Vd=theta2*((WT/80)**theta3)*exp(eta2) Cipred=A1/Vd dA1/dt = K0-CL*C*A2 dA2/dt = Kenz,in*(1-FACTOR)-Kenz,out*A2 Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1) K0=infusion rate C=CBZ plasma concentration A2=relative amount of enzyme in compartment 2 Kenz,in= enzyme production Kenz,out= enzyme degradation FACTOR=fractional decrease of enzyme production rate after discontinuation of treatment
raw.parameter_values: theta1=3.05 theta2=64.3 theta3=0.869 Kenz,in=1 Kenz,out=0.00805 FACTOR=0.494 omega1=0.562 omega2=0.418 sigma1=0.519

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: CL =theta1*exp(eta1) Vd=theta2*((WT/80)**theta3)*exp(eta2) Cipred=A1/Vd dA1/dt = K0-CL*C*A2 dA2/dt = Kenz,in*(1-FACTOR)-Kenz,out*A2 Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1) K0=infusion rate C=CBZ plasma concentration A2=relative amount of enzyme in compartment 2 Kenz,in= enzyme production Kenz,out= enzyme degradation FACTOR=fractional decrease of enzyme production rate after discontinuation of treatment
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.dose: infusion doses before and after discontinuation of regular treatment in patients
study.objective: “This information can provide evidence-based guidelines for management of drug therapy when carbamazepine is discontinued.”

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
